capability_questions.capability_name: Service exists and is in good condition

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a code management service?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a code management service exists

questions.prompt: Is the code management service reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the service is reviewed on a regular cadence for efficacy
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular code management service efficacy review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have code management software to manage publishing, versioning, updating, and deleting code?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether code management software supports the full code lifecycle
questions.evaluation_focus: Code management software for publishing, versioning, updating, and deleting code

questions.prompt: Is the code management platform and lifecycle process applicable to all applications or only critical ones?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether code management scope covers all or critical applications

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized documented process for code lifecycle management?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a formalized documented process governs code lifecycle
questions.evaluation_focus: Formalized documented code lifecycle management process

questions.prompt: Is the code lifecycle process automated with CI/CD pipelines?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether code lifecycle management is automated via CI/CD
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated code management with CI/CD pipelines

questions.prompt: Is the code lifecycle process reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the code lifecycle process is reviewed on a regular cadence

capability_questions.capability_name: Enterprise code repositories and secure storage

questions.prompt: Is all enterprise application code stored securely in enterprise repositories?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether all enterprise application code is in secure repositories
questions.evaluation_focus: All enterprise application code in secure repositories

questions.prompt: Are repository access controls and storage configurations enforced to keep all code stored securely?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether secure storage controls protect all code in repositories
questions.evaluation_focus: Secure storage for all code in repositories

questions.prompt: Are repositories scanned frequently for vulnerable or malicious code and integrated with vulnerability management systems?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether repository scanning integrates with vulnerability management
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent repository scanning integrated with vulnerability management

questions.prompt: Is access to all code repositories limited to specific users based on function?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether repository access is limited by function
questions.evaluation_focus: Function-based access limits for all code repositories

questions.prompt: Does CI/CD control access to multiple code repositories and staging locations?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether CI/CD governs access to repositories and staging locations
questions.evaluation_focus: CI/CD controls access to repositories and staging locations

questions.prompt: Is access to code repositories reviewed at least quarterly to prevent privilege creep?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether repository access is reviewed on a regular cadence
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular repository access review to prevent privilege creep

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a process to provision code testing environments for code that needs to be created and tested?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether testing environments are provisioned for code creation and testing
questions.evaluation_focus: Process to provision code testing environments

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a process to deprovision code testing environments after deletion or movement to production?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether testing environments are deprovisioned after deletion or production movement
questions.evaluation_focus: Process to deprovision code testing environments after deletion or production movement

questions.prompt: Is the testing environment lifecycle performed for all applications (or all in-scope critical applications)?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether testing environment lifecycle applies broadly across applications
questions.evaluation_focus: Testing environment lifecycle for all applications

questions.prompt: Is testing environment provisioning and deprovisioning automated as part of CI/CD?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether testing environment lifecycle is automated via CI/CD
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated provisioning and deprovisioning via CI/CD
